lab_home_intro: Choose a lab area to explore new ideas, iterate on interactions, and grow each experiment over time.
lab_category_game_description: Gameplay loops, mechanics, and playful systems we can prototype next.
lab_category_ui_description: Interface-focused exercises that help us shape reusable interaction patterns.
lab_category_ai_description: Agent flows, model interactions, and product ideas powered by AI.
lab_experiment_agent_registry_descriptio: Browse system agents, inspect resolved capabilities, and manage user-owned agent configurations in one catalog.
lab_experiment_todo_description: A simple todo experience to validate list interactions, input flow, and shared UI boundaries.
todo_page_intro: A first UI experiment built from the shared domain model and shared UI components.
todo_empty_state: No todos yet. Add your first item to start the experiment.
agent_registry_intro: Browse system agents, inspect resolved model capabilities, and create or edit user-owned agent configurations outside the chat workflow.
agent_registry_empty_filtered_descriptio: Adjust your search or filters to see more of the resolved agent catalog.
agent_registry_empty_description: Create your first custom agent to start building a reusable registry.
agent_registry_select_description: Choose a resolved agent from the registry to inspect its prompt, model card, and tool configuration.
lab_experiment_chat_description: Chat with AI agents backed by multiple models and configurable tool sets.
lab_experiment_platformer_description: Run a small side-scroller with the in-app engine.
lab_experiment_platformer_editor_descrip: Paint tiles, place entities, save user maps.
lab_experiment_rts_description: Isometric real-time strategy with procedural maps and a scripted AI opponent.
lab_experiment_racing_description: Top-tier driving feel with Pacejka tires, ARB, anti-dive, thermal models, and lap timing.
lab_settings_description: Manage provider API keys and other app-wide configuration.
lab_category_system_description: App-wide configuration that controls how the lab connects to AI providers and tools.
settings_intro: Provider API keys are stored locally in a per-channel secrets file with restricted (0600) permissions. Saved keys take effect on the next chat message.
settings_provider_openai_description: Used by GPT-4.1 and other OpenAI-hosted models.
settings_provider_replicate_description: Used for image generation (Flux, SDXL, Recraft) and background music.
settings_saved: Saved. New keys take effect on the next chat message.
settings_saved_with_invalid: Saved, but at least one key did not validate against its provider. See the inline error.
settings_shell_override_hint: This key is exported by your shell environment and overrides any value stored in the secrets file. Unset it from your shell to edit it here.
settings_web_mode_description: Provider API keys live in a local secrets file managed by the desktop app. Open the desktop build to change them.
marketing_dashboard_intro: Migrate and operate the marketing workflow: products, personas, campaigns, creatives, stories, assets, and exports.
marketing_card_products_description: Create products and manage product-scoped personas.
marketing_products_intro: Manage marketing products before generating personas, campaigns, creatives, and stories.
marketing_products_empty_description: Create a product to start building product-scoped personas and campaigns.
marketing_personas_intro: Browse and manage buyer personas across marketing products.
marketing_personas_link_note: Personas should be linked to a marketing product.
marketing_personas_scoped_note: Personas are scoped to this product.
marketing_personas_empty_description_glo: Create a persona manually or generate product-scoped personas from a product page.
marketing_personas_empty_description_pro: Create or generate personas for this product.
marketing_personas_create_product_first: Create a product before creating personas.
marketing_home_products_description: Create and manage your marketing products
marketing_product_detail_delete_error: Cannot delete a product that has personas. Remove personas first.
marketing_personas_empty_description: Create a product first, then add personas to it
marketing_personas_no_products_descripti: You need at least one product before creating a persona
marketing_campaigns_intro: Plan and manage marketing campaigns tied to your products.
marketing_campaigns_empty_description: Create a campaign to start planning marketing efforts for your products.
marketing_creatives_intro: Compose and manage creative assets for your campaigns.
marketing_creatives_empty_description: Create a creative asset to start building campaign content.
marketing_canvas_templates_intro: Manage reusable canvas templates for your marketing creatives.
marketing_canvas_templates_empty_descrip: Create a canvas template to speed up creative production.
marketing_scenes_empty_description: Add a scene to start building your story.
marketing_bgm_intro: Manage and generate background music tracks for your marketing stories.
marketing_bgm_empty_description: Generate or upload background music for your marketing content.
marketing_settings_placeholder: Settings will be available in a future update.
storyboard_page_description: Create prompt-driven storyboards with generated frames, assets, transitions, and export.
storyboard_empty_state_cta: Create your first storyboard to get started.
storyboard_error_backend_unavailable_des: The storyboard service could not connect to the database. Start the app with the dev server or check your configuration.
storyboard_error_server_description: An unexpected error occurred while loading your storyboards.
storyboard_error_network_description: Could not reach the storyboard service. Please check your network connection.
